chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 646 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 15.07.2025 Mr. Faisal Shams, Advocate for the Applicants Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy PG for State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the applicants places on record certified copy of order dated 14.04.2025 passed in Criminal Case No.341 of 2024 pending before Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate/Presiding Officer Consumer Protection Court, Sukkur, wherein the orders have been passed for suspension of the proceedings in a case arising out of FIR No.128 of 2024 lodged at Police Station “A” Section, Sukkur. In the circumstances, Counsel for the applicants seeks withdrawal of this application with permission to seek recourse in accordance with the law before the appropriate forum. Accordingly, in view of the submission of the Counsel, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of / withdrawn in the above terms. Judge ARBROHI/PS
